description_long: This is a modern, widescreen curved computer monitor with a slim profile and a sleek, minimalist design. The front features a vibrant display showing a high-resolution landscape image, framed by a thin, dark bezel. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular stand with a central column that appears to allow for some height adjustment. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with no visible buttons or ports, emphasizing its clean aesthetic. The overall color scheme is a combination of matte gray and black, with the stand matching the monitor's body. The monitor's curvature and wide aspect ratio suggest it is designed for immersive viewing experiences, suitable for both professional and entertainment use.
description: A sleek, curved widescreen computer monitor with a thin bezel and a sturdy, rectangular stand. The display is vibrant and the design is modern and minimalist.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pronounced curvature of the screen and the depth of the central support column and stand.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, unbroken back panel and the central attachment of the stand.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the curved screen and the robust, rectangular stand.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide, curved screen with a thin bezel and a vivid landscape image.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, dark-colored, and has a matte finish with slightly rounded corners, providing a modern and unobtrusive frame around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a central vertical support column, made of matte-finished plastic or metal, appearing sturdy and possibly height-adjustable.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
